author: Presented by RGA
body:
Presented by RGA

Extensive research shows that workers are struggling with the perceived complexities of preparing for retirement. As pension schemes continue to evolve around the world, the need for workers to think about their finances in retirement and actively plan for life after work has increased. In this two part-series, RGA’s Diana Bosworth, Senior Research Analyst, Strategic Research, discusses the importance of preparing for retirement, outlines the reasons why today's product development landscape is daunting and discusses the many ways insurers and banks are assisting people with planning for retirement.

Learn more >
